title: Cult of Azazel
description: A mod that adds a mansion-like structure to Nether
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ef222000a010a2c12d021ff186095f587434d6c.gif)

![description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17ab372e3b45722636b26b36c8fc13b7a8821cb8.png)

**Cult of Azazel** - A mod that adds a massive new dungeon to Hell, divided into three zones. At the end, you’ll face a battle with the final boss, who will reward you with new items. Each zone serves a specific purpose and benefits the god Azazel.

This mod adds over 10+ new mobs with unique mechanics, 4 secondary-small structures, and a main structure.

Nether now also has its own version of bees - **they’re quite useful in the search**.

[MOD NOW HAVE DISCORD SERVER](https://discord.gg/35dgPFnGTG)

![sd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69631a2d412952f213d2082145c268070a8e853b.png)

The mod has been translated into 6 languages **(including cutscenes & Zone names)** 

-English

-Russian

-Deutsch

-Spanish

-Chinese

-Japanese

-Portuguese

![flags](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bf48339690f9761bcc5a6c191b2e946c6d11a47.png)

![sd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69631a2d412952f213d2082145c268070a8e853b.png)

# **Requirements:**
[Geckolib mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
